hero.badgeText: Trusted by thousands of donors worldwide
hero.headline: Transform Charity Into
hero.subheadline: We orchestrate world-class charity construction projects with unwavering transparency, precision, and trust. Build mosques, schools, and community centers that serve generations.

howItWorks.headline: Simple, Transparent Process
howItWorks.subheadline: From vision to reality in three clear steps

step1.title: Choose Your Project
step1.description: Select from mosques, schools, community centers, water facilities, or custom projects.

step2.title: We Build & Monitor
step2.description: Our trusted teams handle construction with regular updates and full transparency.

step3.title: Impact Delivered
step3.description: Receive completion reports with photos, GPS coordinates, and lasting impact.

projects.headline: Our Projects
projects.subheadline: Real-world impact through quality construction and community-focused infrastructure

footer.description: Helping individuals, families, and organizations build lasting infrastructure that transforms communities through transparent, trusted charity construction.

about.headline: Building Trust, Delivering Impact
about.subheadline: We exist to transform charitable intentions into real, completed infrastructure that serves communities for generations to come.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To simplify charity construction by managing end-to-end projects for donors, ensuring every dollar is used wisely, transparently, and effectively to create lasting infrastructure that transforms communities.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: A world where charitable construction is trusted, accessible, and impactful - where every donor can confidently build infrastructure that creates opportunity, dignity, and lasting change for generations.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.emptyCartMessage: Your cart is empty. Please add some projects to continue.

contact.description: Have questions? Get in touch with us.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully.
contact.errorMessage: There was an error sending your message. Please try again later.
contact.name: Name

startProject.title: Start a Project
startProject.description: Tell us about your vision and we'll help you turn it into lasting community impact.
startProject.successMessage: Thank you! Your project request has been submitted successfully.
startProject.errorMessage: There was an error submitting your request. Please try again or contact us directly.

aboutPage.headline: Building Trust, Delivering Impact
aboutPage.subheadline: We exist to transform charitable intentions into real, completed infrastructure that serves communities for generations to come.
aboutPage.valuesSectionSubtitle: The principles that guide every project we build

values.title: Transparency
values.content: Complete visibility into costs, progress, and outcomes for every donor.

values.title: Frugality
values.content: We reduce overhead and maximize on-ground impact without sacrificing quality.

values.title: Community Focus
values.content: Projects are designed with local partners to solve real community needs.

aboutPage.approachSectionSubtitle: Frugal, transparent, and committed for the long-term

approach.title: Frugal Operations
approach.content: We keep operating costs low by combining local partnerships with efficient project execution.

approach.title: Complete Transparency
approach.content: Donors receive clear updates, milestone evidence, and reporting from start to completion.

aboutPage.whyWeExistDescription: Too many donors want to build lasting charitable projects but struggle with complexity, uncertain costs, and lack of transparency. We remove these barriers by making impact-building simple, trustworthy, and accessible.

howItWorksPage.headline: From Vision to Reality
howItWorksPage.subheadline: A clear, transparent process that takes you from initial idea to completed infrastructure

detailedSteps.overviewDescription: Define project goals, budget, location, and implementation roadmap.

steps.title: Define Scope
steps.description: Align your goals, budget, and target beneficiaries with our project advisors.

steps.title: Site Assessment
steps.description: Evaluate location suitability, local regulations, and community requirements.

detailedSteps.overviewDescription: Execute construction with quality control and transparent milestones.

steps.title: Construction Execution
steps.description: Our teams build according to approved plans with strict quality supervision.

steps.title: Progress Reporting
steps.description: Receive scheduled updates, photos, and verified milestone completion reports.

detailedSteps.overviewDescription: Handover completed infrastructure with measurable impact evidence.

steps.title: Project Handover
steps.description: Final handover confirms quality, functionality, and community readiness.

steps.title: Impact Documentation
steps.description: You receive completion proof, cost breakdown, and long-term impact data.

trustPoints.title: Verified Execution
trustPoints.description: Each stage follows a controlled workflow with documented milestones.

trustPoints.title: Transparent Reporting
trustPoints.description: Budgets, updates, and deliverables are shared clearly with every donor.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.description: Join hundreds of donors who have built lasting impact through our transparent process.

whatWeBuildPage.headline: Infrastructure for Lasting Impact
whatWeBuildPage.subheadline: From spiritual centers to educational facilities, we build infrastructure that serves communities for generations

mosques.title: Mosques
mosques.description: Build places of worship that serve as spiritual centers for entire communities.
benefits: Prayer halls, ablution facilities, and courtyards
Quality construction built to last generations
mosques.impact: Ongoing spiritual benefit (Sadaqah Jariyah) and vital local infrastructure.

schools.title: Schools & Educational Facilities
schools.description: Create learning environments that transform lives for children and adults.
schools.impact: Supports long-term education outcomes and breaks cycles of poverty.

iftar.title: Iftar Relief Kitchens
iftar.description: Support Ramadan feeding programs with dedicated kitchen and distribution infrastructure.
benefits: Dedicated food prep and delivery infrastructure
Cold storage, serving stations, and dining areas
iftar.impact: Delivers warm, reliable iftar meals to families throughout Ramadan.

adha.title: Eid al-Adha Donation Hubs
adha.description: Build transparent Adha distribution hubs for ethical processing and delivery.
benefits: Secure welfare and halal processing facilities
adha.impact: Expands dignified Eid al-Adha support for vulnerable households.

custom.title: Custom Visionary Projects
custom.description: Have a specific high-impact project in mind? We plan and execute bespoke infrastructure tailored to your vision.

impactPage.headline: Our Global Impact
impactPage.subheadline: See the real difference we are making in communities worldwide.

stories.title: A New Center for Learning
stories.description: A single school project transformed educational access for over 300 children.

impactPage.completedInfrastructureSubtitle: A record of physical transformation across the globe.

cta.title: Ready to Build Your Eternal Legacy?
cta.description: Join our community of visionaries building high-impact, transparent infrastructure for communities in need.
